name: task-worker
description: HTTP bridge service that accepts signed tasks from Hermes, forwards them to a local OpenClaw gateway, and posts AI results back to Hermes via webhooks.

scripts.check: node --check task-worker.js && node --check routes/search-codebase.js && node --check scripts/reindex-codebase.js && node --check services/code-memory/config.js && node --check services/code-memory/indexer.js && node --check services/code-memory/search.js
